title: EvergreenHUD
body: # EvergreenHUD ![Dev Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Polyfrost/EvergreenHUD.svg?style=for-the-badge&color=1452cc&label=release) EvergreenHUD, originally maintained by isXander, is *the* most advanced HUD mod for 1.8.9 and 1.12.2. Now, with OneConfig support, this mod is built for every type of player; from a telly bridger to a mad PvPer, from a SkyBlock player to a Arcade Games player. ![2023-02-28_14 48 51](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/45589059/221962995-531a5ce4-9a89-4b53-9c10-1472b412bec1.png)
